156 D0500J1_STF_SHRT_TMPR_CD D0500J1_STF_SHRT_TMPR_CD D0500J1 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Short Temper Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment whether the resident is short-tempered or easily annoyed. -=Not assessed/no information
